user_query: What was the most expensive restaurant before we cancelled them? Check the previous itinerary versions

node_data.name: Alo Restaurant
node_data.description: Three Michelin-starred French tasting menu. Extremely expensive and exclusive fine dining. Intimate 8-course experience with wine pairings. Very formal and upscale.

selected_nodes.reasoning: Alo Restaurant has the highest expected_cost (CAD 300-400) of the candidates and is listed in the referenced previous itinerary version, so it is the most expensive restaurant before the cancellations/changes.
